crisil-ratings-press-releases.title: Credit ratio of India Inc moderates to 1.50 in the second half
crisil-ratings-press-releases.description: The Crisil Ratings credit ratio, or the proportion of rating upgrades to downgrades, stood at 1.50 times in the second half of fiscal 2026, moderating from 2.17 times in the first half.

crisil-ratings-press-releases.title: Residential realty sales growth to moderate slightly to 4-6% in fiscal 2027
crisil-ratings-press-releases.description: The residential real estate industry appears to have entered a phase of calibrated growth after a strong post-pandemic surge that saw it clock a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 26% in sales (value) from fiscal 2022 to fiscal 2025.

crisil-ratings-press-releases.title: Fertiliser production to dip 10-15% if Middle East issues persist
crisil-ratings-press-releases.description: Supply chain disruptions stemming from the ongoing conflict in the Middle East can potentially impact annual domestic production of both complex fertilisers and urea by 10-15%. crisil-research.title: Crisil Economy First Cut: A tad higher

icici-bank-research.title: Food inflation inches higher, while core steady
